title: cyclosorus richardsii
intro: Cyclosorus richardsii, also known as Richards' fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The cyclosorus richardsii is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by drying and processing its leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application to aid in the treatment of various health issues.
